bio: Steve Botsford Jr. is listed among Democratic candidates for the 2026 Illinois U.S. Senate primary. His name appears in statewide candidate summaries for the March 17 ballot. (Source: Shaw Local primary ballot guide, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)
